tags.name: setup
tags.description: Initial project setup and configuration tasks

tasks.title: Initialize Task Master System
tasks.description: Set up Task Master configuration for AI Orchestra Dashboard with proper templates and workflows

tasks.title: Verify AI Team Communication Channels
tasks.description: Test AppleScript automation for all AI team members (Claude, Gemini, Codex, Cursor) and ensure reliable message delivery

tasks.title: Configure GitHub Issues Integration
tasks.description: Set up GitHub Issues templates, labels, and automation for AI task management

tags.name: infrastructure
tags.description: Core system infrastructure and backend development

tasks.title: Enhance Backend API for Task Orchestration
tasks.description: Extend FastAPI backend with task management endpoints, AI agent communication, and GitHub integration

tasks.title: Implement WebSocket Real-time Communication
tasks.description: Add WebSocket support for real-time updates between AI agents, dashboard, and GitHub

tasks.title: Create AppleScript Automation Library
tasks.description: Develop comprehensive AppleScript library for reliable AI agent communication and session management

tags.name: frontend
tags.description: Dashboard UI and user interface development

tasks.title: Design Real-time AI Team Dashboard
tasks.description: Create comprehensive dashboard showing AI team status, active tasks, progress bars, and system health

tasks.title: Implement Task Assignment Interface
tasks.description: Build intuitive interface for creating, assigning, and managing tasks across AI team members

tasks.title: Add Multi-language Support (Korean/English)
tasks.description: Implement internationalization for the dashboard with Korean and English language support

tasks.title: GitHub Issues Automation System
tasks.description: Create automated GitHub Issues creation, assignment, and tracking for AI tasks with custom templates and labels

tasks.title: AI Agent Session Monitoring
tasks.description: Implement monitoring system for iTerm sessions, mode detection (especially Gemini Shell/AI), and health checks

tasks.title: File System Change Detection
tasks.description: Create real-time file monitoring system to track AI agent work progress and automatically update task status

tasks.title: Code Review and Quality Standards
tasks.description: Establish code review processes, quality standards, and automated checks for all AI-generated code

tasks.title: Comprehensive System Documentation
tasks.description: Create detailed documentation for AI team workflows, API endpoints, and system architecture

tasks.title: Integration Testing Suite
tasks.description: Develop comprehensive testing suite for AI communication, GitHub integration, and dashboard functionality

tasks.title: Production Environment Setup
tasks.description: Configure production environment with proper security, monitoring, and backup systems

tasks.title: Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Optimize system performance for handling multiple concurrent AI agents and real-time updates
